faq.question: Does it work for grocery store?
faq.answer: Yes, builder creates sites for any store types.

faq.question: Can I add product catalog?
faq.answer: Yes, product cards are created automatically.

faq.question: Is there address block?
faq.answer: Yes, address, hours, and map are included.

faq.question: Can I add prices?
faq.answer: Yes, prices can be specified in product cards.
